name: huggingface-on-aws
description: Deploy and train Hugging Face models on AWS with SageMaker AI and Neuron (Trainium/Inferentia). Provides MCP tools for endpoint management, training jobs, and instance recommendations, plus steering for TorchNeuron, distributed training, and model optimization.
author: AWS

servers.name: huggingface-hub
servers.description: Search and explore Hugging Face models, datasets, Spaces, and papers

config.instructions: Use this server to search for models on Hugging Face Hub, check model cards, find datasets, and discover Spaces. Configure via https://huggingface.co/settings/mcp

servers.name: sagemaker-neuron
servers.description: Deploy and train Hugging Face models on SageMaker AI with Neuron containers

steering.description: TorchNeuron patterns, device placement, torch.compile, and migration from CUDA
SageMaker AI deployment patterns, DLC containers, SDK usage, and instance selection
Distributed training on Trainium with DDP, FSDP, TP, and multi-node
Model compilation, BF16, Neuron cache, vLLM serving, and NKI kernels
